channel.title: Posts on Gillian
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Gillian

item.title: The Game of Disconnecting 🔌
item.description: My first dive into actual site and service hosting through disconne.cc

item.title: UK / Living Symphonies 🌲
item.description: A week of art and forest in Warwick, UK, as well as a summary of what I was doing for the last 6 months

item.title: Regular Expression Power Hour 🔤
item.description: Also known as “String Comprehension”, “Code Within Code”, and “Annoying”

item.title: Silly Sound's Kyle 🐈
item.description: VCV Rack eurorack module for envelope detecting and sidechaining

item.title: Envelope Detector Research and Ramblings ✉️
item.description: Looking into different envelope detecting methods for a future sidechaining module

item.title: Silly Sound's Lola 🐶
item.description: VCV Rack eurorack module for live signal sampling and playback

item.title: Silly Sound's Sesame 🐱
item.description: VCV Rack eurorack module for clock modulation, specifically a merger of a swing and burst signal modulator.

item.title: Silly Sounds - An Introduction 🎛
item.description: The background for all other content under the Silly Sounds real fake label

item.title: Conway's Game of Synth 👾
item.description: Merging an interest in Conway’s Game of Life with very crude generative synthesis in a small side project.

item.title: Lola's Research Dogument 🐕
item.description: New dog coming in, gathered a boatload of information for preparation and reference. Future edit, her name is Lola and she is a dream.
